profile.name: POOJA PATEL
profile.title: Data Analyst
profile.bio: Data Analyst with 3+ years of experience leveraging Python, SQL, Tableau, and Power BI to deliver data-driven insights. Led database optimization initiatives at Accenture, improving data retrieval speed by 40%. At PennyMac, reduced loan processing time by 20% by deploying machine learning models and optimizing data workflows. Architected real-time data warehouse integrating Snowflake with AWS S3 for Tesla sales data, showcasing cloud native analytics expertise.
